# Repository Settings

This document outlines recommended settings for making this repository public.

## General Settings

- **Repository name**: `dom-replay`
- **Description**: Record and replay DOM interactions for web applications
- **Website**: https://dom-replay.dev (if you have a website)
- **Topics**:
  - dom
  - session-replay
  - recording
  - replay
  - javascript
  - typescript
  - web-development
  - browser
  - frontend

## Features

- [x] Issues
- [x] Discussions (recommended for community engagement)
- [ ] Projects
- [x] Wiki
- [x] Sponsorships (if you want to enable funding)

## Options

- [x] Always suggest updating pull request branches
- [ ] Allow auto-merge
- [ ] Automatically delete head branches
- [ ] Allow update branch (recommended)

## Danger Zone

- [ ] Make this repository public (only when ready!)
- [ ] Transfer ownership (not recommended)

## GitHub Apps & Integrations

Consider enabling:
- CodeQL for security scanning
- Dependabot alerts
- Dependency review on PRs

## Branch Protection

See [branch-protection.md](./branch-protection.md) for recommended rules.
